meta.summary: RNA-SeQC 2 command-line tool for RNA-seq read-count, coverage, expression, and quality-control metrics.
meta.description: RNA-SeQC 2 command-line tool for RNA-seq read-count, coverage, expression, and quality-control metrics.

test: rnaseqc --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'RNASeQC 2.4.2' >/dev/null && rnaseqc --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'rnaseqc [gtf] [bam] [output]' >/dev/null && rnaseqc --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--fasta=[fasta]' >/dev/null && file "$(command -v rnaseqc)" | grep -F 'x86-64' >/dev/null && file "$(command -v rnaseqc)" | grep -F 'statically linked' >/dev/null && grep -F 'binary_sha256=5505022cec1c99fcd9d36e3b3ca22ebd2d0f547658ce52e4fa90d82dd1430926' /opt/rnaseqc/share/doc/rnaseqc/source.txt >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-rnaseqc-core-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; rnaseqc -u -s tiny --coverage-mask 0 --gene-length 50 /opt/rnaseqc/share/testdata/smoke/genes.gtf /opt/rnaseqc/share/testdata/smoke/reads.sam out > run.log 2>&1 && test -s out/tiny.metrics.tsv && test -s out/tiny.gene_reads.gct && test -s out/tiny.exon_reads.gct && test -s out/tiny.gene_tpm.gct && grep -F 'Sample	tiny' out/tiny.metrics.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'Mapping Rate' out/tiny.metrics.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'gene1' out/tiny.gene_reads.gct >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-rnaseqc-coverage-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; rnaseqc -u -s tiny --coverage --coverage-mask 0 --gene-length 50 --rpkm /opt/rnaseqc/share/testdata/smoke/genes.gtf /opt/rnaseqc/share/testdata/smoke/reads.sam out > run.log 2>&1 && test -s out/tiny.coverage.tsv && test -s out/tiny.gene_rpkm.gct && grep -F 'coverage_mean' out/tiny.coverage.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'gene1' out/tiny.gene_rpkm.gct >/dev/null

upstream.name: RNA-SeQC
upstream.citation: Graubert et al. 2021, RNA-SeQC 2: efficient RNA-seq quality control and quantification for large cohorts
